arts.sum: One of Chelsea’s most important players when fit is still yet to make a competitive appearance this season. Club captain Reece James has been unavailable...

arts.ttl: Can Chelsea win the Premier League this season?
arts.sum: It's still very much early days in the Premier League season, but after tomorrow's match with West Ham we will be 5 games into the season, and things will be starting to take shape. From before the season started, Chelsea were ranked among the teams most likely to make it into the top 4 and a guaranteed Champions […]

arts.ttl: Chelsea trio warned they are ‘playing for their futures’
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly warned Christopher Nkunku, Noni Madueke and Mykhailo Mudryk that the trio are ‘playing for their futures’ at the club. Enzo Maresca has a depth of options available in his forward line following the club’s summer business. Joao Felix, Jadon Sancho and Pedro Neto all arrived for significant fees during the transfer window, […] The post Chelsea trio warned they are ‘playing for their futures’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca states the two things Chelsea must do to catch up to Manchester City
arts.sum: 'I still think that we are far.'

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea won race for wonderkid transfer despite “significant” PSG effort, claims expert
arts.sum: Chelsea were able to see off competition from Paris Saint-Germain for the transfer of Palmeiras wonderkid Estevao Willian, according to Jonathan Johnson. Speaking exclusively to CaughtOffside for his latest Daily Briefing column, Johnson provided some insight into how hard PSG also tried to sign Estevao when they were looking at him and other talented young […] The post Exclusive: Chelsea won race for wonderkid transfer despite “significant” PSG effort, claims expert appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Barrow without four key players for Chelsea tie
arts.sum: Barrow are without Connor Mahoney, Robbie Gotts, Sam Barnes and Chris Popov for their clash against Chelsea, as… The post Barrow without four key players for Chelsea tie appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Maresca tells Chelsea signing 'he's not the main player'
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has told Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall that he must fight for his place as he is no longer 'the main player' he was at Leicester. Speaking to the media ahead of Chelsea's clash with League Two side Barrow in the Carabao Cup, Maresca told Dewsbury-Hall that he needs to come to grips with no longer being 'the main player.'

arts.ttl: 'A really good fit': Chris Sutton raves about 'excellent' Chelsea player who's perfect for them
arts.sum: Chris Sutton thinks that one player at Chelsea is a brilliant fit for them with their style of play. There’s certainly a lot of talent...

arts.ttl: Opinion: Pat Nevin probably correct on Moises Caicedo, for now
arts.sum: Former Chelsea winger Pat Nevin has been complimenting Moises Caicedo this weekend after another fine performance against West Ham. But he is refusing to be drawn too much into the N’Golo Kante comparisons yet. Chelsea fans were comparing Caicedo to N’Golo Kante following his excellent display against West Ham. However, Nevin does not think he is […]

arts.ttl: ‘Amazing’ Chelsea summer signing has to take his chance tonight in Carabao Cup vs Barrow – opinion
arts.sum: Tonight will almost certainly prove a great opportunity for Enzo Maresca to get a good look at some of the members of his Chelsea squad...
